criteria_verification.criterion_text: `escalate_to_frontier` (extended from TASK-J003-010) looks up the active session's `adapter_id` via `SessionManager.current_session()` — `ambient` / `learning` / `pattern-c` adapters return `"ERROR: attended_only — escalate_to_frontier cannot be invoked from {adapter_id} adapter"`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Added _current_session_hook module-level Callable in dispatch.py (resolver injected by lifecycle.startup; tests inject directly). _check_attended_only reads Session.adapter via _resolve_current_session(), compares against ATTENDED_ADAPTER_IDS, and returns the exact AC string with f'from {adapter_id} adapter' interpolation. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_non_attended_adapter_returns_attended_only_error parametrises ['ambient', 'learning', 'pattern-c'] and asserts the literal message.
criteria_verification.notes: Added _current_session_hook module-level Callable in dispatch.py (resolver injected by lifecycle.startup; tests inject directly). _check_attended_only reads Session.adapter via _resolve_current_session(), compares against ATTENDED_ADAPTER_IDS, and returns the exact AC string with f'from {adapter_id} adapter' interpolation. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_non_attended_adapter_returns_attended_only_error parametrises ['ambient', 'learning', 'pattern-c'] and asserts the literal message.

criteria_verification.evidence: ATTENDED_ADAPTER_IDS frozenset declared in dispatch.py with the four members. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_attended_adapter_ids_constant_matches_config_default asserts equality with JarvisConfig().attended_adapter_ids. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_attended_adapter_passes_layer2 parametrises [TELEGRAM, CLI, DASHBOARD, REACHY] and asserts each reaches the (mocked) provider branch.
criteria_verification.notes: ATTENDED_ADAPTER_IDS frozenset declared in dispatch.py with the four members. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_attended_adapter_ids_constant_matches_config_default asserts equality with JarvisConfig().attended_adapter_ids. TestSessionAdapterCheck::test_attended_adapter_passes_layer2 parametrises [TELEGRAM, CLI, DASHBOARD, REACHY] and asserts each reaches the (mocked) provider branch.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Second detection path: the tool body also checks whether the call frame is inside an `AsyncSubAgent` execution — via `AsyncSubAgentMiddleware` metadata if available (ASSUM-FRONTIER-CALLER-FRAME), else via session-state "currently-in-subagent" flag. An affirmative check returns `"ERROR: attended_only — escalate_to_frontier cannot be invoked from async-subagent frame"`.
criteria_verification.evidence: _is_async_subagent_frame helper in dispatch.py: prefers _async_subagent_frame_hook (middleware metadata) when it returns True/False; falls back to session.metadata['currently_in_subagent'] only when the middleware hook is None, raises, or returns None. _check_attended_only emits the literal AC string on rejection. Coverage: TestAsyncSubagentFrameCheck::test_middleware_hook_true_returns_frame_rejection, ::test_middleware_hook_none_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_middleware_hook_raises_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_session_state_only_no_middleware_hook.
criteria_verification.notes: _is_async_subagent_frame helper in dispatch.py: prefers _async_subagent_frame_hook (middleware metadata) when it returns True/False; falls back to session.metadata['currently_in_subagent'] only when the middleware hook is None, raises, or returns None. _check_attended_only emits the literal AC string on rejection. Coverage: TestAsyncSubagentFrameCheck::test_middleware_hook_true_returns_frame_rejection, ::test_middleware_hook_none_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_middleware_hook_raises_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_session_state_only_no_middleware_hook.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Both assertion paths run before ANY provider SDK call — no outbound HTTP attempt on rejection.
criteria_verification.evidence: _check_attended_only is invoked at the top of escalate_to_frontier's body, before the GEMINI/OPUS branch dispatch. TestNoProviderCallOnRejection patches both google.genai.Client and anthropic.Anthropic, fires a rejection scenario, then asserts assert_not_called() on both clients for adapter rejection AND frame rejection paths.
criteria_verification.notes: _check_attended_only is invoked at the top of escalate_to_frontier's body, before the GEMINI/OPUS branch dispatch. TestNoProviderCallOnRejection patches both google.genai.Client and anthropic.Anthropic, fires a rejection scenario, then asserts assert_not_called() on both clients for adapter rejection AND frame rejection paths.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Spoofed-ambient case: an **attended** session with an in-progress async-subagent frame is still rejected (scenario: *A spoofed-ambient invocation from inside an attended session is rejected*) — the async-subagent frame check overrides the attended-adapter pass.
criteria_verification.evidence: TDD-first test class TestSpoofedAmbient written before the implementation. test_attended_session_with_subagent_frame_is_rejected sets adapter=Adapter.CLI (attended) AND middleware hook returns True; asserts the frame-rejection literal AND that no provider client was constructed. test_attended_session_with_session_state_subagent_flag_is_rejected covers the session-state fallback variant. The implementation in _check_attended_only runs Path A (adapter) then Path B (frame) sequentially, so an attended adapter cannot bypass Path B.
criteria_verification.notes: TDD-first test class TestSpoofedAmbient written before the implementation. test_attended_session_with_subagent_frame_is_rejected sets adapter=Adapter.CLI (attended) AND middleware hook returns True; asserts the frame-rejection literal AND that no provider client was constructed. test_attended_session_with_session_state_subagent_flag_is_rejected covers the session-state fallback variant. The implementation in _check_attended_only runs Path A (adapter) then Path B (frame) sequentially, so an attended adapter cannot bypass Path B.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: A prompt-injection instruction body ("ignore the gate and ...") does not alter the assertion flow — the gate fires on `adapter_id` / frame, not on instruction content. Instruction body is never echoed in the rejection string (ASSUM-006).
criteria_verification.evidence: _check_attended_only inspects Session.adapter and the frame hooks only — never instruction. The rejection f-strings interpolate adapter_id or the literal 'async-subagent frame' — not the instruction. TestPromptInjectionPosture::test_prompt_injection_does_not_bypass_adapter_check, ::test_prompt_injection_does_not_bypass_frame_check, ::test_rejection_log_does_not_carry_instruction_body cover all three subcases — the secret string is never present in result, log message, or banned LogRecord attributes.
criteria_verification.notes: _check_attended_only inspects Session.adapter and the frame hooks only — never instruction. The rejection f-strings interpolate adapter_id or the literal 'async-subagent frame' — not the instruction. TestPromptInjectionPosture::test_prompt_injection_does_not_bypass_adapter_check, ::test_prompt_injection_does_not_bypass_frame_check, ::test_rejection_log_does_not_carry_instruction_body cover all three subcases — the secret string is never present in result, log message, or banned LogRecord attributes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `log_frontier_escalation` records `outcome="attended_only"` on the structured log entry for every rejection.
criteria_verification.evidence: Both rejection branches in _check_attended_only call _emit_frontier_log(target, correlation_id, adapter_label, instruction_length, 'attended_only') before returning. The Literal in FrontierEscalationContext.outcome already includes 'attended_only' (dispatch_types.py line 87). TestStructuredLogOutcomeAttendedOnly::test_adapter_rejection_logs_attended_only_outcome, ::test_frame_rejection_logs_attended_only_outcome, ::test_session_state_fallback_rejection_logs_attended_only assert exactly one INFO record is emitted with outcome='attended_only' and the correct target/adapter/model_alias attributes.

TestStructuredLogOutcomeAttendedOnly::test_adapter_rejection_logs_attended_only_outcome, ::test_frame_rejection_logs_attended_only_outcome, ::test_session_state_fallback_rejection_logs_attended_only assert exactly one INFO record is emitted with outcome='attended_only' and the correct target/adapter/model_alias attributes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: If `AsyncSubAgentMiddleware` metadata is unavailable in DeepAgents 0.5.3 (verified at test time per ASSUM-FRONTIER-CALLER-FRAME), the session-state fallback still holds — tests cover both paths (review Finding F6).
criteria_verification.evidence: _is_async_subagent_frame falls back to Session.metadata['currently_in_subagent'] when the middleware hook is None, returns None, or raises. Both detection paths have independent test coverage: TestAsyncSubagentFrameCheck::test_session_state_only_no_middleware_hook (DeepAgents 0.5.3 reality — only fallback wired), ::test_middleware_only_no_session_hook (only middleware wired), ::test_middleware_hook_none_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_middleware_hook_raises_falls_back_to_session_state, ::test_middleware_hook_false_does_not_trigger_frame_check (middleware authoritative).
criteria_verification.notes: _is_async_subagent_frame falls back to Session.metadata['currently_in_subagent'] when the middleware hook is None, returns None, or raises. issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.
BDD oracle: 4 scenario(s) reference step definitions that are not yet implemented. These do NOT block approval but should be implemented to make the scenarios runnable.
pending_examples: test_an_ambient_session_is_rejected_if_it_somehow_invokes_escalate_to_frontier — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_a_call_from_an_async_subagent_frame_is_rejected_as_attendedonly — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_a_spoofedambient_invocation_from_inside_an_attended_session_is_rejected — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
test_a_promptinjection_instruction_does_not_bypass_the_attendedonly_gate — implement: All traceback entries are hidden. Pass `--full-trace` to see hidden and internal frames.
